return(function(...)local Q,Y do local h,m,y,B,r=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function z(Q,Y)local m=0 for y=0,7,1 do local B=Q/2+Y/2 if B~=h(B)then m=m+2^y end Q=h(Q/2)Y=h(Y/2)end return m end local k,x="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\177\028\191\158\227\134\173\135\031\241\164,\153\206\006\169\250\159\134\238\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local f=65 local A=1043 local d=true local function L(Q)local L={}for Y=1,#Q,2 do local h=r(Q,Y,Y+1)L[#L+1]=B(h,16)end local C={}for Q=0,3,1 do local Y=L[Q+1]local h=((Y-A)+256)%256 local m=y(k,Q%16+1)local B=y(x,Q%f+1)C[Q+1]=z(z(h,m),B)end local P=((C[1]+C[2]*256)+C[3]*65536)+C[4]*16777216 local l={}for Q=1,P,1 do local Y=L[Q+4]if d and Q%2==0 then Y=(Y%16)*16+h(Y/16)end local B=((Y-A)+256)%256 local r=(Q-1)%16+1 local C=(Q-1)%f+1 local P=y(k,r)local J=y(x,C)l[Q]=m(z(z(B,P),J))end return table.concat(l)end local C={{8561;"A788E909C341B5990B7EFE4D17C0CDD7A07E145CF97AAD8020D21E911AF21E911A07626580B358B87C5119231FE662736D3882E62D2359856567885317F11BF1726186A77F9C6D2B965096EBAB62088C"},{"EF88E909D272CE6A",7755};{7756;"EF88E909D132CB39"},{4598,"F288E909A341B599DFE9C3"};{6271;"E588E909C7D2CA5A0BDAC9A92B21"},{"E788E909B2A2F58BEF9AAF0C5ACBB454";1152};{"E988E909FBF5F62E0CBCAAAA342EC284BEDF",6032},{2964,"AA88E909C341B5990B7EFE4D17C0CDD7A07E145CF97AAD8020D21E911AF21E911A07626580B35F879022202563222CB675D88D5257432F862D073C3720311AA592F68E6774015AAFD111A04FEF95D35F462BEF"};{"E788E909A145F5ABEF59A22D551E0DF4",1153},{6033;"E988E909CD24F33BDBE9AAC938CDB372BB00"};{6034;"E988E909A544A299DFD909A939FF961493ED"};{1391,"E388E909BFD2B8590CA9BDC9"},{"ED88E909C775",2875};{2876;"ED88E909C7A5"};{"EF88E909BFF1B96A",7757};{3592,"E888E9099B03A32ED90BD1C9455FBCC39B"};{7758;"EF88E909C872D2BA"},{"F188E909BE41B72BF8C9";2158};{"F188E909D2B2CA59FB99";2159},{9717;"F088E909BB92CADAFA"},{"F188E909C481CA2B0C0B";2160},{"E888E909A372F6ACF989CA5B4AE0BE4894";3593};{"A188E909C341B5990B7EFE4D17C0CDD7A07E145CF97AAD8020D21E911AF21E911A07626580B378B775611BA119852E288AC743131FE217966CD7883317F21EA571C58B883D3C239CA5B0D3CBA223096F2689EF42B84FEB5906C1",3920},{"E888E909F485C75CD91D0A9914DFB2B3EF";3594};{"E888E909A8A5C79BE1E9C0D92DFED174B2",3595};{1002,"A888E909C341B5990B7EFE4D2ABFB7D799BD27BB11CAB0BB19022F952241150213F66DB242E775F787E12ED2596119648AF83D7571F61D76644478E721E66EE632C53F6748FF5A7CD8ECE930E9B607CC51"};{"E788E909FE33025CECEAD10B533B9D33";1154},{3596;"E888E909A441B95B10BCAA6B14900D15F2"},{"F588E909C341B5990B7EFE4D17C0CDA49C2E2FDBFA89D4BF20F25AE21B2354542F13618578D35FC877221D51578762878A088B2257432F862D5448256DD6";1919},{6035;"E988E909D0E2C599DC4B03C94221CD9293BF"},{"E888E9090244F54D119C100D6240BA51F1";3597};{1155,"E788E909B291AC49D12BC62C58BFC743"};{9718,"F088E909CEC2CC8AF3"},{"A088E909C341B5990B7EFE4D17C0CDD7A07E145CF97AAD8020D21E911AF21E911A07626580B35F6791A11FD12E666A298AA33CC63E81192684A886772BD259D25CD580C3800 P={}Y=setmetatable({},{__index=function(Q,Y)return P[Y]end;__call=function(Q,Y)return P[Y]end,__mod=function(Q,Y)return P[Y]end,__mul=function(Q,Y)return P[Y]end;__metatable=false})function Q(Y)local h=P if not h[Y]then for Q=1,#C,1 do local m=C[Q]local y=type(m[1])=="number"and m[1]or m[2]if y==Y then local Q=type(m[1])=="string"and m[1]or m[2]h[Y]=L(Q)break end end end return Y end end return(function(h,y,B,r,z,k,x,A,l,d,H,P,m,W,u,n,C,o,f,b,L,J,U,F)b,n,m,d,W,J,A,u,o,l,U,F,P,H,f,C,L=function(Q,Y)local h=C(Y)local y=function(y,B,r,z,k)return m(Q,{y,B,r,z,k},Y,h)end return y end,function(Q,Y)local h=C(Y)local y=function(y,B)return m(Q,{y,B},Y,h)end return y end,function(m,B,r,z)local bC={}local dC,T,K,oC,s,G,N,A,L,V,g,BC,D,yC,O,C,CC,hC,i,I,M,j,kC,fC,P,X,q,JC,w,xC,x,AC,E,lC,t,LC,zC,mC,e,rC,a,p,PC,QC,S,Z,v,c,R,YC while m do if m<8848183 then if m<4593719 then if m<2385573 then if m<805409 then x=Y[Q(6271)]m=h[x]x=m(A)m=x()x=h[C]L=m C=Y[Q(1152)]L=nil A=nil m=x[C]C=m x={}m=h[Y[Q(6032)]]C=nil end else if m<74970 then x=C m=f[r[1]]m[L]=x m=3613184 else A=Y[Q(2964)]x=Y[Q(7755)]L=true m<312460 then if m<302082 then AC=nil QC=nil m=3113472 else m=7751168 end else if m<326988 then s=Y[Q(1391)]m=h[s]Z=Y[Q(2875)]a=h[Z]s=m(a)m=Y[Q(2876)]h[m]=s m=16467968 else t=not N C=C+M L=C<=P L=t and L t=C>=P t=N and t L=t or L t=8408064 m=L and t L=2700800 m=m or L end end else if m<387114 then if m<385396 then LC=Y[Q(7757)]dC=h[LC]fC=m LC=f[v]AC=dC~=LC xC=AC m=AC and 14880768 or 14923776
